info.title: GraphQL C# Client Generator Console App
info.description: A simple strongly typed C# GraphQL client generator console app

options.name: --outputPath
options.description:
Required. Output path; include file name for single
file output type; folder name for one class per
file output type

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Required. Root namespace all classes and other
members are generated to

options.name: --serviceUrl
options.description:
GraphQL service URL used for retrieving schema
metadata

options.name: --schemaFileName
options.description: Path to schema metadata file in JSON format

options.name: --header
options.description:
Format: {Header}:{Value}; allows to enter custom
headers required to fetch GraphQL metadata

options.name: --classPrefix
options.description:
Class prefix; value "Test" extends class name to
"TestTypeName"

options.name: --classSuffix
options.description:
Class suffix, for instance for version control;
value "V2" extends class name to "TypeNameV2"

options.name: --csharpVersion
options.description:
C# version compatibility; allowed values:
Compatible (default), Newest,
NewestWithNullableReferences

options.name: --memberAccessibility
options.description:
Class and interface access level; allowed values:
Public (default), Internal

options.name: --outputType
options.description:
Specifies generated classes organization; allowed
values: SingleFile (default), OneClassPerFile

options.name: --classMapping
options.description:
Format: {GraphQlTypeName}:{C#ClassName}; allows to
define custom class names for specific GraphQL
types; common reason for this is to avoid property
of the same name as its parent class

options.name: --idTypeMapping
options.description:
Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL ID
data type; allowed values: Guid (default), String,
Object

options.name: --floatTypeMapping
options.description:
Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL Float
data type; allowed values: Decimal (default),
Double, Float

options.name: --jsonPropertyAttribute
options.description:
Specifies the condition for using
"JsonPropertyAttribute"; allowed values:
CaseInsensitive (default), CaseSensitive, Always,
Never, UseDefaultAlias
